title: Sky Islands Legacy
description: Sky Islands Survival lets you explore a whole new breathtaking world above the clouds. Fight, Create, Sail, and Conquer!
body:
![Banner for Sky Islands Legacy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b0e6993e23c03a2f147865e58883e63f3a83a49.jpeg)

![200 Downloads Thank you!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a06f69ef77ab186f9286be63f3ba391419f0f03a.png)

## Introduction
Sky Islands Legacy is a exploration themed modpack that seeks to recapture the feelings of adventure high above the clouds! Glide from island to island using **Gliders** while you scavengefor resources to construct your very own flying machines from **Immersive Aircraft**! Establish a base with **Create** and store your bounty above with **Cloud Storage**. Face new monsters and unique challanges as a powerful mage with **Iron Spellbooks**, or a unmatched fighter with **Tetra**. Use your new powers to conquer new **structures, dungeons, dimensions, and more!**

![The Farming and Friends Update Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c78187eb0c474194ba4d82112e83e555cf09faf5.jpeg)

## Version 1.1.4: The Farming and Friends Update!
Enjoy new crops, and new ways to cook them in your Sky Kitchens! This update also features updates to many core mods to bring the upto speed with the rest that Sky Islands has to offer.

## About
SIL is a modpack designed to emphasise exploration and unique solutions to problems- while there are a great many mods you'll know and love in this pack, there are many upcoming mods included to provide new experences in the clouds.

This pack has been developed on-stream with my lovely audiance over on YouTube at [KokoPlaysGames](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1o_NCGYQGt28Kgx78ol17g/). If you want to help shape future development of the pack or get your name added in the credits below, consider dropping by during our development streams!
